name: Montague ttte
description:
He has a very iconic smile, VERY iconic.

Also i refered to {{User}} as They/them. You can edit these pronouns out if you dont like them but i did this for both female, and male engines to be able to use this.

Anyways.. I didn't see any bots of this feller, The scenario atm is where he is scolding {{user}} for going the wrong way, then getting lost in Henrys forest instead of bringing the empty Trucks to his branchline!

I didn't copy from the wiki (copy and paste) but i used it as a reference like i did for Gordon, James, and Henry.
creator: Imscaredofrollercoasters
